basic_details.job_title: Burdwan Medical College Molecular Biologist Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Burdwan Medical College has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 1 Molecular Biologist Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on at the Burdwan Medical College office with original documents and self-attested copies.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Biotechnology from any recognized University.
qualification.details: Molecular Biologist: M.Sc. in Biotechnology from any recognized University. 3 years' work experience in relevant field after obtaining essential qualification. Preference will be given to candidates having experience in RT-PCR. Mammalian Cell Culture handling experience. Experience of Computer Application / Data management.

content_sections.heading: Burdwan Medical College Molecular Biologist Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Burdwan Medical College Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: Burdwan Medical College Molecular Biologist Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
Burdwan Medical College Molecular Biologist Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Molecular Biologist: M.Sc. in Biotechnology from any recognized University. 3 years' work experience in relevant field after obtaining essential qualification. Preference will be given to candidates having experience in RT-PCR. Mammalian Cell Culture handling experience. Experience of Computer Application / Data management.

content_sections.heading: Burdwan Medical College Molecular Biologist Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Burdwan Medical College Molecular Biologist Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
Burdwan Medical College Molecular Biologist Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
Burdwan Medical College Molecular Biologist Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Burdwan Medical College Molecular Biologist Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for Burdwan Medical College Molecular Biologist Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required. Candidates are invited to a Walk-In-Interview. Submit CV, photocopies of all essential academics and experience related documents, which should be self-attested, and one valid govt. issued photo ID with age proof at the time of walk-In-Interview. Submit an affidavit at the time of joining that they will accept all general instructions & terms and conditions related to the post. Submit a 'No Objection Certificate' (NOC) from their current employer.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Molecular Biologist position?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a walk-in interview. Candidates need to attend the interview on the specified date, which is 16-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Molecular Biologist post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is an M.Sc. in Biotechnology from any recognized University.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Molecular Biologist position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Molecular Biologist position is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Molecular Biologist role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 40,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Molecular Biologist post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Molecular Biologist position.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-In-Interview conducted by the Institute Level Recruitment Committee.

faq.question: Q7. What documents do I need to carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You need to carry your CV, self-attested photocopies of all essential academic and experience documents, and one valid government-issued photo ID with age proof.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the reporting time for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The reporting time for the walk-in interview is on 16-07-2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Burdwan Medical College, Purba Burdwan, West Bengal, 713104.
